calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-12-2003 Off Calendar

Default Prove Up In Scd. #218 At 9:00 A.M.
Off Calendar Aug-12-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/V. Mack, CSR: Deborah Neville.
Appearances:
Steven Miyake, Esq. for Plaintiff Skyline Coach, Inc., Mitsuyo Suzuki, V.P., also present with Japanese interpreter, Ken Nishikawa, was sworn & examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff and against the defendants Benjamin J. Gutierrez and Blanca Gutierrez, individuals and doing business as Blanquita Adventure Tours.
Principal of $52,460.00
Costs of $284.00
Interest of $19,661.72. For the total of $72,405.72.
Judgment signed in open court.
